clinical_blockers: Oedema, nephrotic-range terminology, nephrotic-syndrome features, diabetes or hypertension context, general vitals, weight, lifestyle advice, medication plan, safety-netting, fixed intervals, PRN wording, and the combined history draft remain unsupported.
The workflow does not encode age, CKD status, transient causes, confirmatory sample, albuminuria category, haematuria threshold, or referral qualifiers.
Diagnosis, investigation selection, treatment, medicine changes, referral urgency, and exact follow-up timing remain clinician responsibilities.
